description: Schema reference for affiliate program files

fields.program: Display name of the affiliate program
fields.enabled: true/false — toggle without deleting the file
fields.priority: Integer — lower = shown first when multiple programs match
fields.ftc_disclosure: true/false — triggers FTC disclosure line in UI
fields.cookie_days: Integer — cookie window in days (for reference only)

resources.title: Display title shown to user
resources.level_min: Integer 1-5 — minimum skill level to show this
resources.level_max: Integer 1-5 — maximum skill level to show this
